# Cotech 36-7900 rain gauge
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/3537
#
# 169 codes posted across the whole issue thread by the reporter
# (Aarnma) between 2026-06-03 and 2026-06-07, demodulated by rtl_433
# itself via a flex decoder, not hand-transcribed. Covers a full day's
# smooth diurnal temperature swing (14.7-23.6 C) confirming the
# temperature formula, and a controlled multi-tip rain gauge test
# confirming the rain field is a monotonic counter (see README.md).
#
# Each code here is one repeat of the 60 bit row; the real sensor sends
# ~13 identical repeats per transmission and the decoder requires 8
# matching rows (see the `repeat` file), so run_test.py repeats each
# code 8x before decoding.

# 2026-06-03 20:32:14
{60}ab80e6000000000

# 2026-06-03 20:34:08
{60}ab80e9000000027

# 2026-06-03 20:36:02
{60}ab80e600000007a

# 2026-06-03 20:37:56
{60}ab80e40000000cd
